titleStmt.title: SII 15.60: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 60. (B.K. No. 40 of 1926-27.) LAKKUṆḌI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On two beams in the Chandramauḷīśvara temple.
This is dated the third regnal year of the king, Krōdhi, Pushya śu. 5, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti, If śu 5 is a mistake for ba 5, then the date corresponds to 1184 A.D., December 24, Monday, °04.

It records a gift of money made by Basavarasa Siddhayya for the benefit of the god Ayistara Kēśavāditya. Basavarasa Siddhayya was the son-in-law of Dhannugi Daṇḍanātha and is described as the dear son of the one thousand Mahājanas of Lokkiguṇḍi and Taḷabhōgada-kēṇikaṟa. Lokkiguṇḍi is mentioned as a great agrahāra created by Śrī Rāma. A large number of gifts made to the same temple by several persons are also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmaccāḷukyapratāpacakravartti tribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēśvaradēvavijaya rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhapravarddhamānamācaṁdratāraṁbaraṁ(baraṁ) saluttamira © svasti yamaniyama svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhāṇa japasamādhi śīlaguṇa saṁvanna rssaptasōmasaṁsthāvabhṛtāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtaśarīraruṁ caturvvēdapāragaraṣṭādaśa dharmmaśāstrakuśaḷarēkavākyaracaḷitadhairyyasthai
ryyaparākramarāśritajanakalpavrikṣarahitapakṣakṣayarkkaliyugagāṁgēyarpparamōpakāri gaḷuṁ paranārēdūraruṁ grāmanāmōttavardduṣṭavidhvaṁsakarvviśiṣṭajanāśrayarkkā makrōdhalōbhamōhavivarjjitarśśaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararssamastaguṇaviśēṣōnnatarappa śrī rāmaradatti mahāgrahāra śrīmallokkiguṁḍiyūroḍeya pramu
kha śrī sāsirvvaru naradu dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ surakṣitamāgi rakṣisuttamira . kaṁda . hariṇāṁka naṁte kuvaḷayavaramitrarssarasiyaṁte kamaḷākararīśvaranaṁte śaktiyuktarddhareyoḷu sāsirvvaranavaranē vaṁṇipudō . Intu negaḷtevetta śrīsāsirvvara priyaputrarappa karavakka taḷabhōgada kēṇikāṟaṁ basavarasa siddhayyaṁgaḷa guṇamahimeyeṁteṁdaḍa . vṟitta . ©
© pusigeḍeyogadoḷnuḍi pavitramenippa caritramoḷpuvettasava guṇaṁ samabhyudayamaṁ taḷedūrjjita lakṣmi mattemeṇḍasegamaḷaṁkagoṁḍa jasameṁbivanārjisidaṁ niraṁtaraṁ basavaṇa nāyaka sujanasaṁkuḷamastakavastunāyaka . Ātatakīrttiyeṁdu paripūrṇnaguṇōdaya neṁdu hṛtsamudbhāsurarūpaneṁdu budhabāndhavarakṣakaneṁdu satkaḷānvitavivēkaneṁdu pogaḷguṁ neradhannugidaṁḍanāthajāmātṛvanaḷkaṟiṁ negaḷda siddhugi dēvananē jagajjanaṁ . Iṁtu sakaḷaguṇakke nele
yoda taḷabhōgada kēṇikāṟa basavarasa siddhayyaṁgaḷu śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvavarṣada 3 neya krōdhi saṁvatsarada pusya suddha paṁcami sōmavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkramāṇa byatīpātadaṁdayistara kēsavādityadēvara naṁdādēvigagācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluvaṁ tāgi taṁma taḷabhōgada sthaḷadalu biṭṭa paṇa �taḷabhōgada hiriya sēnabhōgaṁ kaḷala kandara vāmarasaru biṭṭa paṇa 1 potthagrāhakaṁ basavarasanaḷiya mallayya biṭṭa haṇa 1 mattavā
bhattahaṭṭiya sthaḷadaluṁ naḍeva kēsavadēva nāgaṁṇanintivaru biṭṭa paṇa 1 bhavaṇigeya sthaḷakke naḍeva sēnabhōga lakkharasamallayyaṁgaḷu biṭṭa paṇa 1 nellakaṭṭeyalliyuṁ naḍeva boppa dēvanāyakaruṁ māciseṭṭiyaruṁ biṭṭa haṇa 1 Eleya sodeya sthaḷakke naḍeva sēna bōva mādhavadēva sōmayyaṁgaḷu biṭṭa paṇa 1 voṁde vaṇakke naḍeva sēnabōva sōmayyanāgadēvariṁtirvvaruṁ biṭṭa paṇa 1 nālkuṁ hebbāgilaluṁ taḷabhōgada dasayiṁ naḍeva kōlukāṟaru biṭṭa haṇa 1 pēṇṭheya kēriyalu naḍevaṁta
ha kōlukāṟarirvvaruṁ biṭṭa vīsa 10 dēvara vīḷayakke biṭṭele 200 dīpāvaḷiya harvvadalu dēvara bhōgakke biṭṭa meṇasu baḷḷa yeraḍu kārapuṁṇamiyalu dēvargge habbakkeṁdu biṭṭabella 20 byavahāri saṁkaṁṇanā sōvaṁṇa meḷasina koḷagada sivaṁṇagaḷiṁtī mūvaru biṭṭa ma 1 . kōla kēṇikāṟaṁ Ācayyaṁ kōla kēṇiyalu biṭṭa ma 1 koḍeya vīsavaṁ nōḍuva hoṁnavara bācarasa miṁḍara sōvaṇnaniṁtivaru dhūpakke biṭṭa haṇa 1 Avara kōlukāṟa basavaṁṇa koṭṭa hāga 1 .
© mattavā puṇyadinadalu karavaḍada kēṇikāṟaṁ basavarasa siddhayyaṁgaḷatiśayadharmmamanassaruṁ purassararāgi śrī kēśavādityadēvaraṁgabhōgavācaṁdratāraṁbaraṁ naḍevaṁtāgi taṁma karavaḍada kēṇiyalu biṭṭa paṇa 5 Ā hiriya sēnabōva kaḷalakandara vāmarasa dhūpakke biṭṭa paṇa 1 mattavā potthagrāhaka vatsarasa biṭṭa ma 1 karavaḍada bhramāṁtukakke naḍeva nāgarasa biṭṭa ma 1 Ā pāṁḍavara baṁmadēva biṭṭa ma 1 Ā kōlukāṟa nāraṇadēva dāmayyaniṁtivaru biṭṭa paṇa 1
yiṁtī sāsanamārggadindārādaḍaṁ taḷabhōgakaravaḍadiṁ koṁḍa kēṇikāṟaru taṁtaṁma dharmmaṁgaḷāgācaṁdratāraṁbaraṁ naḍavantāgi naḍasuvarnnaḍasidavargge gaṁge gaye vāraṇāsi yalu sahaśra kavileyaṁ sahasra vēdavidarāgirdda brāhmaṇarggitta phalavakku yillā Ā tīrtthaṁgaḷalā kavileymaṁ sahaśra vēdapāraga brāhmaṇaraṁ hiṁse māḍidātanakku . kōṭi payaṁ kapileyanekkōṭi tapōdhanara vēdavidaraṁ pannirkkōṭiyane kōṭitīrtthada kōṭi mahādinadoḷaḷidanintidanaḷidaṁ . maṁgaḷaṁ . ©
Digital edition of SII 15.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
